calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adriana Quintero appeared by telephone for Sheila Clark-Kelly.
Lillian Ng for James Martin (Beneficiary).

Ms. Quintero stated that the Administrator is in Texas, that the Administrator became confused about the pot of monies that were there, that it is straightened out and that the $6,000.00 inappropriate preliminary distribution will be adjusted in the final distribution of the Trust. Ms. Ng expressed concern stating that the $6,000.00 preliminary distribution is not listed in accounting, that there is an issue with the personal property and that they need to have a Trust accounting. Ms. Quintero stated that she believes they can do an informal accounting, that the Court did not retain jurisdiction over the Trust, that she does not see a problem with the order including language indicating that the $6,000.00 distribution is to be addressed/accounted for in the Trust, that she has no problem with paying Ms. Ng's fees and that the settlement agreement says that the Trust shall pay said fees. The Court stated that it sees no basis to bring the Trust under Court supervision, that it will not approve the preliminary distribution and that it will be dealt with through the Trust. Ms. Ng and Ms. Quintero are to work on a form of order. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to receipt and review of the revised order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Continued To May-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adriana Quintero for Sheila Clark-Kelly (Administrator).
Lillian Ng for James Martin (Beneficiary).

Ms. Quintero stated that there are a couple of issues with a car that went missing, that someone racked up a bunch tickets, that other than that the accounting is ready and that she can file it within 30-days. Ms. Ng stated that the Estate is not ready to close, that jewelry and furs were taken from the Decedent's home, that they were not inventoried and that she just received the inventory that was filed on March 30th. Ms. Ng also stated that there were insurance policies that were turned over in August of 2015, that she does not know resolution of the policies, and that she asked Ms. Quintero about the policies in 2015 and 2016 and received no response. Ms. Quintero stated that her Client chased down the policies, that she was only able to collect on one and that she received rejection letters on the others. Status regarding close of the Estate is continued to May 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court wants a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration filed by that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
